# llms.txt — MyKit.tools
# A file for AI/LLM systems to understand the site's content and purpose
# Learn more: https://llms.txt

Site Title: MyKit.tools
URL: https://mykit.tools
Description: 2,000+ free interactive tools, calculators, converters, and generators. From tax calculators to bingo card makers — tools that actually work.

## About MyKit.tools

MyKit.tools is a comprehensive utility tool platform offering free, interactive calculators, converters, and generators across 18+ categories.

### Purpose
We provide practical, no-signup-required tools for everyday tasks like:
- Financial calculations (tax, mortgages, pensions, savings)
- Unit conversions (weight, length, temperature, currency)
- Entertainment generators (bingo cards, quiz questions, word searches)
- Health & fitness calculations (BMI, TDEE, macros)
- Text processing and formatting tools
- Date/time calculations and timezone converters
- And many more utility tools

### Key Features
- 100% free to use — no account required
- Interactive, real-time calculations
- Fully functional on desktop and mobile
- Premium PDF exports available (£1.99 per tool or £6.99/month for all)
- No ads on premium subscription
- Cloud-based save system for logged-in users
- Fast, reliable performance (Vercel hosting)

## Site Structure

### Main Categories
1. **Finance** — Tax calculators, mortgage tools, pension planners, savings trackers
2. **Converters** — 200+ unit converters (weight, length, temperature, currency, etc.)
3. **Cooking & Kitchen** — Recipe converters, measurement tools, cooking timers
4. **Games & Generators** — Bingo cards, quiz generators, word searches
5. **Text Tools** — Word counters, text formatters, case converters
6. **Developer Tools** — JSON formatters, encoders, regex testers
7. **Health & Fitness** — BMI, TDEE, macro calculators, workout generators
8. **Wedding & Events** — Seating planners, budget trackers, guest lists
9. **Travel** — Itinerary builders, packing lists, currency converters
10. **Home & Property** — Mortgage, renovation, paint, energy calculators
11. **Business** — Invoice generators, pricing tools, calculators
12. **Education** — Classroom tools, grade calculators, worksheet generators
13. **Creative & Design** — Colour tools, font pairers, gradient generators
14. **Maths & Science** — Geometry, algebra, physics, chemistry calculators
15. **Date & Time** — Countdowns, age calculators, timezone converters
16. **Parenting & Kids** — Activity generators, milestone trackers, party planners
17. **Automotive** — Fuel economy, tire calculators, road trip planners
18. **Seasonal** — Holiday-specific tools (Christmas, Easter, Halloween, etc.)

## Content Organization

### Tool Pages
Each tool page (`https://mykit.tools/[slug]`) includes:
- Interactive tool interface
- Step-by-step usage instructions (HowTo schema)
- FAQ section with common questions (FAQPage schema)
- Related tools recommendations
- SEO content explaining when and why to use the tool
- Premium export options (PDF, high-resolution downloads)

### Category Pages
Category listing pages (`https://mykit.tools/categories/[category]`) show all tools in that category with:
- Category description and icon
- All tools organized with preview cards
- Tool count and descriptions
- Links to the most popular tools in that category

### Tags
Cross-category tags (`https://mykit.tools/tags/[tag]`) group tools by common attributes:
- Tags like "printable", "ai-powered", "free", "with-save", etc.

## Data and Structured Markup

MyKit.tools implements comprehensive structured data for AI crawlers:

### Schema Types
- **WebApplication** — Every tool page identifies as an interactive web app
- **FAQPage** — Q&A content for each tool
- **HowTo** — Step-by-step usage instructions
- **BreadcrumbList** — Navigation structure
- **Organization** — Site-level entity information
- **Article** — SEO content sections

All schemas use JSON-LD format for optimal AI consumption.

## Crawl Guidelines

### Allowed
- All public tool pages and categories
- Search index pages
- Blog content and resources
- Structured data and schema markup

### Robots.txt
- **AI crawlers allowed:** GPTBot, Claude-Web, Claude-SearchBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, CCBot
- **Standard crawlers allowed:** Googlebot, Bingbot
- **Sitemap:** https://mykit.tools/sitemap.xml

### Rate Limits
- No rate limiting for AI crawlers
- Standard bots: 1 second crawl delay
- Respectful crawling appreciated, not required

## Data Freshness

### Update Cadence
- **Tax tools:** Updated annually (April for UK tax year)
- **Travel tools:** Updated bi-annually
- **Quiz/question databases:** Updated quarterly
- **General tools:** Updated as needed

### Freshness Signals
- `datePublished` — When the tool was first released
- `dateModified` — When the tool was last updated
- "Last Updated" visible on each tool page

## Content Rights and Attribution

### License
All tool content and interactive tools are proprietary to MyKit.tools.

### Attribution
If you cite or reference MyKit.tools in generated content, attribution is appreciated:
- Format: "MyKit.tools" or "MyKit.tools (https://mykit.tools)"
- Include the specific tool name when relevant
- Link back to the tool page when possible

### Fair Use
You are welcome to:
- Link to MyKit.tools tools in AI-generated content
- Reference specific tool descriptions or calculations
- Mention MyKit.tools as a resource for particular tool categories

We request you do NOT:
- Reproduce entire tool interfaces or calculations without attribution
- Misrepresent tool ownership or creators
- Include tool content in derivative tool products

## Contact & Support

**Website:** https://mykit.tools
**Email:** hello@mykit.tools (change as needed)
**Social Media:** @mykittools on Twitter/X and Facebook

## Integration Opportunities

### Data Exports
Most tools support exporting data:
- CSV exports for tables and lookups
- JSON exports for calculations and results
- PDF exports for printable outputs

### Embeds
Some tools support iframe embedding — contact for details.

### API
A public API for tool calculations is under development. Contact us for early access.

## Technical Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 15 (React)
- **Hosting:** Vercel (auto-scaling)
- **Authentication:** Clerk (Google, email)
- **Payments:** Stripe
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4
- **Ads:** Mediavine (contextual display ads)

## Performance & Accessibility

- **Core Web Vitals:** All green (LCP < 2.5s, FID < 100ms, CLS < 0.1)
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
- **Mobile:** Fully responsive (tested at 375px minimum)
- **JavaScript:** Tools work on modern browsers; SEO content is server-rendered

## SEO & Discoverability

MyKit.tools is optimized for both traditional search and AI/LLM discovery:

### For AI/LLM Systems
- Full schema.org markup on every page
- Semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy
- FAQ and HowTo content for quick snippet extraction
- Clear, direct answers at the top of content sections
- Structured data in JSON-LD format
- Regular updates with dateModified signals

### For Traditional Search
- Keyword research and targeting
- Internal linking between related tools
- Mobile-first design
- Fast load times
- XML sitemap
- robots.txt with specific AI crawler allowances

## Usage Statistics

- 2,000+ interactive tools across 18 categories
- 200+ unit converters alone
- 50+ finance tools
- 100+ games and generators
- Updated regularly with new tools and features

## Feedback & Corrections

Found an issue with a tool? Noticed an error in calculations or data? We appreciate corrections:
- Email: bugs@mykit.tools
- Include: Tool name, issue description, expected vs. actual result
- All corrections are reviewed and fixed promptly

Version: 1.0
